name: Cashwerkz Limited
summary: Cashwerkz Limited, together with its subsidiaries, provides online cash management services in Australia. Its services include responsible entity, and trustee and custodial services to fund managers and investors; and fixed interest broking and advisory services. The company was formerly known as Trustees Australia Limited and changed its name to Cashwerkz Limited in May 2019. Cashwerkz Limited was founded in 1987 and is based in Brisbane, Australia.
